com.hp.workpath.api.scanner

Class ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<T extends ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<T>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<T>
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ScanAttributes.EmailBuilder, ScanAttributes.MeBuilder, ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder, ScanAttributes.UsbBuilder
    Enclosing class:
    ScanAttributes

    public abstract static class ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<T extends ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<T>>
extends java.lang.Object
    Base builder for common scan attributes
    Since:
    API 1

      Sets the blank image removal mode.

      CaptureMode mode

      Sets the color dropout mode.
      T setColorMode(ScanAttributes.ColorMode colorMode)
      Specifies color mode.
      T setContrastAdjustment(ScanAttributes.ContrastAdjustment contrastAdjustment)
      Sets the contrast adjustment level.
      T setCredentials(java.lang.String userName, java.lang.String password)
      Sets the credentials for admin user name and password which configured on a printer to be allowed to run scanning
      T setCropMode(ScanAttributes.CropMode cropMode)
      Sets the crop mode.
      T setCustomLength(float customLength)
      Sets the custom length.
      T setCustomWidth(float customWidth)
      Sets the custom width.
      T setDarknessAdjustment(ScanAttributes.DarknessAdjustment darknessAdjustment)
      Sets the darkness adjustment level.
      T setDocumentFormat(ScanAttributes.DocumentFormat docFormat)
      Sets document format
      T setDuplex(ScanAttributes.Duplex duplex)
      Sets Duplex

      EraseFront margin
      T setEraseMarginUnit(ScanAttributes.EraseMarginUnit eraseMarginUnit)
      EraseMarginUnits
      T setFileName(java.lang.String fileName)
      Sets the scan base file name
      T setFileOptionsAttributes(FileOptionsAttributes fileOptionsAttributes)
      Sets the file options attributes.
      T setJobAssemblyMode(ScanAttributes.JobAssemblyMode jobAssemblyMode)
      Sets the job assembly mode.
      T setMaxPagesPerAttachment(int maxPagesPerAttachment)
      When SplitAttachmentByPages is enabled, scanned documentation is split by 'MaxPagesPerAttachment' value
      T setMediaSource(ScanAttributes.MediaSource mediaSource)
      Sets the media source.
      T setMediaWeightAdjustment(ScanAttributes.MediaWeightAdjustment mediaWeightAdjustment)
      Sets the media weight adjustment.
      T setMisfeedDetectionMode(ScanAttributes.MisfeedDetectionMode misfeedDetectionMode)
      Sets the misfeed detection mode.
      T setOrientation(ScanAttributes.Orientation orientation)
      Specifies the set of original orientation
      T setOutputQuality(ScanAttributes.OutputQuality outputQuality)
      Sets the output quality.
      T setProgressDialogMode(ScanAttributes.ProgressDialogMode progressDialogMode)
      Sets the progress dialog mode.
      T setResolution(ScanAttributes.Resolution res)
      Indicates the resolution for the scanned image(s).
      T setScanPreview(ScanAttributes.ScanPreview scanPreview)
      Sets the scan preview param.
      T setScanSize(ScanAttributes.ScanSize scanSize)
      Specifies the size of the scanned image.
      T setSharpnessAdjustment(ScanAttributes.SharpnessAdjustment sharpnessAdjustment)
      Sets the sharpness adjustment.

      SplitAttachmentByPages
      T setTextPhotoOptimization(ScanAttributes.TextPhotoOptimization textPhotoOptimization)
      Sets the text photo optimization.
      T setTransmissionMode(ScanAttributes.TransmissionMode transmissionMode)
      Sets the transmission mode.

      • setColorMode

        public T setColorMode(ScanAttributes.ColorMode colorMode)
        Specifies color mode.
        Parameters:
        colorMode - The set of colors
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if colorMode is null
        Since:
        API 1

        Since:

      • setScanPreview

        public T setScanPreview(ScanAttributes.ScanPreview scanPreview)
        Sets the scan preview param. This parameter forces showing a preview of scanned image
        Parameters:
        scanPreview - Scan preview flag value
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - is scanPreview is null;
        Since:
        API 1

      • setCredentials

        public T setCredentials(java.lang.String userName,
                        java.lang.String password)
        Sets the credentials for admin user name and password which configured on a printer to be allowed to run scanning
        Parameters:
        userName - privileged user name
        password - privileged user password
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if username or password are null.
        Since:
        API 1
